await_promise.description: Await the expression when it resolves to a Promise (CDP `Runtime.evaluate(awaitPromise=...)`). Defaults to `true`.

return_by_value.description: Ask CDP to serialise the result by value (vs. returning a `RemoteObject` id we cannot use). Defaults to `true`.

tab_id.description: Target tab. Defaults to the Agent Window's currently active tab.

timeout_ms.description: Hard upper bound on the evaluation. Defaults to 30s.
